// Data prediksi harga dari model Deep Learning Time Series
export const pricePredictions = {
  1: {
    name: "Sepatu Sneakers Kasual Pria",
    history: [
      { date: "Jan", actual: 75000, predicted: null },
      { date: "Feb", actual: 70000, predicted: null },
      { date: "Mar", actual: 68000, predicted: null },
      { date: "Apr", actual: 62000, predicted: null },

    name: "Speaker Bluetooth Mini Karaoke",

};
